message:
fix(cli): use Number.isNaN for sync age parsing

Reasoning:
- Avoid global isNaN() coercion so invalid dates don't get coerced to numbers implicitly.
- Keep sync age display deterministic when offline metadata is malformed.

Impact:
- formatSyncAge() now reports "unknown" only when the parsed date is truly NaN.
- No functional changes to the offline fetch flow or meta read logic.
